name: Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2 Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter. Press firmly onto the bottom and halfway up the sides of a (9-inch) springform pan.
3 Beat the cream cheese in a large bowl until fluffy. Gradually beat in the sweetened condensed milk. Beat until smooth.
4 Add the orange juice, pumpkin pie spice, softened cream cheese, salt, pumpkin puree, and whipped cream. Blend thoroughly.
5 Pour into the crust.
6 Bake for 75 minutes, or until the edges spring back when touched lightly (the center will still be soft).
7 Cool and chill.
8 Serve topped with whipped cream.
